CREATE REPLICA TABLE IF NOT EXISTS my_schema.my_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP);
CREATE REPLICA TABLE customer_replica (customer_id INT REFERENCES customers(id), customer_name VARCHAR(100), customer_email VARCHAR(100));
CREATE REPLICA TABLE product_replica (product_id INT PRIMARY KEY, product_name VARCHAR(255), price DECIMAL(10, 2), available_since TIMESTAMP);

CREATE REPLICA TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sales_replica (sale_id INT PRIMARY KEY, product_id INT REFERENCES product_replica(product_id), customer_id INT REFERENCES customer_replica(customer_id), sale_date TIMESTAMP);
CREATE REPLICA TABLE account_replica AS SELECT a.id, a.balance, a.opened_date FROM accounts a WHERE a.balance > 1000;
CREATE REPLICA TABLE IF NOT EXISTS complex_replica (col1 INT, col2 VARCHAR(50), col3 DATE, CONSTRAINT chk_col1 CHECK (col1 >= 0) );

CREATE REPLICA TABLE nested_replica AS SELECT e.id, e.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o WHERE o.employee_id = e.id) AS total_orders FROM employees e WHERE e.department_id = (SELECT d.id FROM departments d WHERE d.name = 'Sales');

CREATE REPLICA TABLE nested_subquery_replica AS SELECT c.id, c.name, (SELECT SUM(oi.quantity) FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE o.customer_id = c.id) AS total_quantity FROM customers c WHERE c.id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM orders WHERE order_date > '2023-01-01');

CREATE REPLICA TABLE joined_replica AS SELECT c.customer_id, c.customer_name, p.product_name FROM customer_replica c JOIN sales_replica s ON c.customer_id = s.customer_id JOIN product_replica p ON s.product_id = p.product_id;
CREATE REPLICA TABLE if_not_exists_replica AS SELECT * FROM some_table WHERE condition = TRUE;
